title: Intel adds iGPU-less mobile chips to Core 200H lineup Raptor Lake-based Core 7 230H and Core 5 205H sport disabled graphics for small form factor desktop boards
summary: Intel introduces two Raptor Lake CPUs in the Core 200H series with disabled iGPUs. The Core 7 230H and Core 5 205H are geared towards small form factor desktops. This move may appeal to users who prioritize performance over graphics capabilities.
insight: Intel adapts to SFF desktop market demands for performance-focused CPUs

title: AMD B650 expansion cards hit retail starting at $199 add four M.2 PCIe 4.0 slots and 11 USB ports to any PC with a PCIe slot
summary: AMD B650 expansion cards hit retail, offering I/O expansion via Promontory 21 chipset. These cards add four M.2 PCIe 4.0 slots and eleven USB ports to PCs with a PCIe slot. This trend provides a cost-effective alternative to upgrading motherboards.
insight: Cost-effective I/O expansion via add-in cards for AMD systems

title: Gaming soundbar can be hijacked from over 16 yards away without touch or pairing the company allegedly refuses to label the blatant security flaw a cybersecurity risk
summary: Rasmus Moorats demonstrated a security flaw in Creative's Sound Blaster Katana V2X, allowing hijacking over Bluetooth from 16 yards away without pairing or touch.
insight: Bluetooth gaming device vulnerability compromises user data and privacy.

title: $6000 semi-truck gaming rig just got a massive upgrade cabin overhaul includes new racing bucket seat, pedals, and other accessories to level up their truck
summary: A semi-truck gamer upgraded their rig with a new cabin overhaul, installing a racing bucket seat, pedals, and other accessories to enhance their gaming experience. The upgrade was done in collaboration with Conspit. This overhaul is expected to provide a more immersive gaming experience.
insight: Enhanced gaming experience through realistic truck simulator setup.

title: The Floppy Disk patent was granted today in 1972 when 80KB took up 8 inches and were really floppy
summary: The patent application for the floppy disk was granted to IBM engineers in 1972, marking a significant innovation in data storage technology.
insight: Revolutionized data storage with flexible, portable, and user-friendly devices.

title: Prusa Research goes full spectrum in anticipation of INDX
summary: Prusa Research introduces ColorMix engine for PrusaSlicer and EasyPrint, enabling full spectrum printing. This new feature allows users to print with a wide range of colors, improving design possibilities. The ColorMix engine is open-source, promoting community development and innovation.
insight: Enhanced color options for 3D printing unlock creative possibilities.

title: Gigabyte Z890 Aorus Elite Wifi7 Plus Motherboard Review: Cost-conscious refresh board delivers (almost) all the fixens
summary: The Gigabyte Z890 Aorus Elite Wifi7 Plus motherboard offers fast networking and storage at an affordable price of under $270.
insight: Cost-effective mainstream motherboard with robust features and performance.

title: Taiwanese startup FormulaV Line wants to break into US market with two new unique cases company expects products to become available on Newegg later this year
summary: Taiwanese startup FormulaV Line enters US market with unique cases, other components at Computex 2026.
insight: Taiwanese company expands global presence in the gaming hardware market.

title: G.Skill explains how AMD EXPO ULL unlocks additional performance expanded profiles allow memory makers to include subtiming tweaks for the first time
summary: AMD's EXPO ULL program allows for lower memory latencies with one click, giving users a streamlined experience. This is an expansion of the existing EXPO profiles, enabling memory makers to include sub-timing tweaks for the first time. The goal is to improve overall system performance.
insight: Faster memory access unlocks smoother gaming and productivity experiences always

title: Huawei-led team claims it post-trained DeepSeek's 1.6-trillion-parameter model 1,000 Ascend 910C chips used in training
summary: Huawei-led research group completed post-training of DeepSeek's 1.6-trillion-parameter V4-Pro model.
insight: Advances in model training efficiency and scalability are significant breakthroughs.

title: Unreleased RTX 3050 Ti engineering sample appears in photos and benchmarks the RTX 3060 alternative that never happened
summary: A leaked RTX 3050 Ti engineering sample has been photographed and benchmarked, showcasing Nvidia's unreleased desktop graphics card that was an alternative to the RTX 3060.
insight: Provides insight into Nvidia's product development and cancelled designs

title: AweSun Cloud KVM Q1 Review An ultra-compact, low-cost KVM over IP solution tested with Windows 11 and Android clients
summary: AweSun Cloud KVM Q1 is an ultra-compact, low-cost KVM over IP solution reviewed with Windows 11 and Android clients. It features a compact design with a USB-C port for keyboard and mouse emulation, HDMI input for video, and Ethernet connectivity. The review explores its capabilities and performance with various targets.
insight: Cost-effective remote access expands possibilities for IT and tech professionals.

title: Anthropic is blacklisted by the Pentagon and being used by the NSA at the same time
summary: Anthropic has embedded engineers within the NSA to guide AI model use. The engineers are working with Claude Mythos, a powerful AI model. They customize the model for specific applications.
insight: Government's reliance on private AI firms raises national security concerns

title: TeamGroup built an external SSD that destroys itself when you send it a text message
summary: TeamGroup's T-Create Expert P35SG external SSD can self-destruct remotely via text message. This feature utilizes a 4G LTE connection for remote access. The drive can be accessed and destroyed even when not plugged into a computer.
insight: Ransomware-proofing through self-destruction in high-stakes data protection scenarios

title: Summer Game Fest 2026: Virtua Fighter is back, Guild Wars 3 is real, and Final Fantasy VII's trilogy is ending
summary: Summer Game Fest revealed new game announcements, including Virtua Fighter's return and a Guild Wars 3 preview. The event also hinted at the conclusion of Final Fantasy VII's trilogy. Sony's State of Play preceded the festival.
insight: Major gaming franchises make significant announcements and updates

title: Google tests making AI Mode the default in Search, then says it was an error
summary: Google tested AI Mode as default in Chrome Canary, sparking concerns. A flag indicated AI Mode would fulfill search queries by default. However, Google later clarified it was an error.
insight: AI Mode default setting raises concerns about search query transparency
